title: Donut Totem
description: Have you ever wanted DrDonut as a totem? Now you can with Donut Totem! Donut Totem is a texture pack that turns your totems into DrDonuts skin.
body:
Have you ever wanted DrDonut as a totem? Now you can with Donut Totem! Donut Totem is a texture pack that turns your totems into DrDonuts Minecraft skin.
All rights reserved. **Do not make your own copy!**
